narrative:
Olentangy Local Sd school district has 78,454 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a clear Republican lean of 10.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.9% D−R vs -22.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
